Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Yushi]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 11''' — Yushi is a Herald on a lightning Path known as the Thunder Fairy.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 4''' — Yushi is known as the Thunder Fairy.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 13''' — Yushi is the Thunder Fairy and Reigan Shen's right hand.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 13''' — Yushi is a Herald with wings made of lightning.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 13''' — Yushi has a spark on the center of her forehead.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 14''' — Yushi's laugh is pleasant and melodious.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 14''' — Yushi is a character Yerin interacts with.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 14''' — Yushi's wings crackle with lightning.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 15''' — Yushi is fighting in a battle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 16''' — Yushi felt as though she was facing a Monarch due to the pressure.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 18''' — Yushi has a diamond-like Remnant.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
